name: O-11 bootstrap eval scenarios: bootstrap respects --token-budget and defers further scenarios when exhausted
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --run-bootstrap-evals --bootstrap-token-budget 5 --tokens-per-scenario 10 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'budget exhausted' err.txt && echo budget_honored 1>&2
